message:
feat(fp-io): SqlConnection::list_unique_constraints + tighten list_indexes (br-sh4v / fd90.31)

Add SqlUniqueConstraintSchema struct (name, columns) and
list_unique_constraints(table, schema) -> Result<Vec<SqlUniqueConstraintSchema>, IoError>
trait method matching SQLAlchemy.Inspector.get_unique_constraints()
shape. Default impl returns Ok(Vec::new()). rusqlite override uses
PRAGMA index_list(table) filtered by origin='u' (auto-created
indexes that back declared UNIQUE constraints) plus PRAGMA
index_info per match, ordered by seq.

Also tighten list_indexes (fd90.28) to additionally exclude
origin='u' rows so the two listings stay disjoint, matching
SQLAlchemy: get_indexes returns user-created CREATE INDEX /
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX; get_unique_constraints returns declared
UNIQUE constraints.

Free-fn list_sql_unique_constraints(conn, table, schema) wraps
the trait call; re-exported via the frankenpandas umbrella with
SqlUniqueConstraintSchema.

8 new tests cover: unknown table -> empty, no-UQ table, inline
UNIQUE column, composite UNIQUE table-constraint, disjoint from
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX, invalid table-name rejection, default impl
returns empty, multi-schema backend stub routing.

360 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,11 +70,13 @@ pub use fp_io::{
     SqlQueryResult,
     SqlReadOptions,
     SqlTableSchema,
+    SqlUniqueConstraintSchema,
     SqlWriteOptions,
     list_sql_foreign_keys,
     list_sql_indexes,
     list_sql_schemas,
     list_sql_tables,
+    list_sql_unique_constraints,
     list_sql_views,
     sql_max_identifier_length,
     sql_primary_key_columns,
